member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass.Unrepresentable
member.summary: The storage representation cannot hold the domain concept.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass.Narrowed
member.summary: The storage representation is narrower than the domain representation, risking data loss.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass.Widened
member.summary: The storage representation is wider than the domain representation (e.g. string vs varchar).

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass.Lossless
member.summary: The storage representation perfectly matches the domain representation.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldClass
member.summary: Classifies the fidelity of mapping a domain field to/from a storage field.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.LineageGrade.Opaque
member.summary: Intentionally unknown or untracked. (Blocked for governed serving fields).

member.name: T:Canon.Core.LineageGrade.Declared
member.summary: Asserted by the author or driver, but lacking structural F# proof.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.LineageGrade.Exact
member.summary: Computed directly and verifiably from the expression structure / database constraints.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.LineageGrade
member.summary: Lineage grade indicates the degree of trust/verification for a field or constraint. Inspired by Symphony's Lineage concepts.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.Refined`2
member.summary: A refined type containing a value that has been proven to satisfy the predicate 'P.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.Lattice`1
member.summary: A closed six-constructor bounded complemented lattice for query formulation.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.Constraint
member.summary: Defines common validation constraints that can be used as Leaves in our Lattice (Symphony model).

member.name: T:Canon.Core.Bound`1
member.summary: Represents boundary definitions for Symphony constraints.

member.name: T:Canon.Core.FieldKind
member.summary: Represents Helios capability-typed field kinds for semantic indexing.
